characters.name: Adrian Marks
characters.description: Adrian MarksBiographical InformationAffiliationsAppearancesAdrian Marksis introduced to Veronica asAurora's gay best friend by herfatherandstep-mother. During her visit to Adrian during theNeptunespring break season, Aurora and Adrian visit the party hosted by the Gutierrez cousins, the same party that Hayley Dewalt went missing from around a week ago. It is on Aurora's visit to Adrian that she goes missing. Upon Veronica's finding of Hayley's body and the realization that the two incidents must be separate, Adrian confesses that Aurora told him that she was really in town to see a guy, and that they were going to run off together and go "off the grid," which is why no one could reach her. In the end, Veronica discovers that Tanner was forced by his associate, Duane Shepard (alias Lee Jackson), to capitalize upon the disappearance of Hayley Dewalt by faking his daughter's abduction. Their plan was to create a fake ransom demand for both Hayley and Aurora's return, taking the reward money (funded through a hotline from Trish Turley's talk show) as ransom and disappearing to Bermuda. Their plan is foiled by a phone call from the real Lee Jackson, who is a woman working for the Meridian Group specializing in ransoms and kidnapping. She quickly unravels the scheme, which ended up concluding in Aurora trying to double-cross her father and his partner. It is on Aurora's visit to Adrian that she goes missing. Upon Veronica's finding of Hayley's body and the realization that the two incidents must be separate, Adrian confesses that Aurora told him that she was really in town to see a guy, and that they were going to run off together and go "off the grid," which is why no one could reach her. In the end, Veronica discovers that Tanner was forced by his associate, Duane Shepard (alias Lee Jackson), to capitalize upon the disappearance of Hayley Dewalt by faking his daughter's abduction. Their plan was to create a fake ransom demand for both Hayley and Aurora's return, taking the reward money (funded through a hotline from Trish Turley's talk show) as ransom and disappearing to Bermuda. Their plan is foiled by a phone call from the real Lee Jackson, who is a woman working for the Meridian Group specializing in ransoms and kidnapping. She quickly unravels the scheme, which ended up concluding in Aurora trying to double-cross her father and his partner. Aurora had Adrian, her secret boyfriend, assault Duane in an alley near the Neptune Grand with one of her brother's maracas, stealing the ransom money from Duane and framing her father for his attack. It is revealed that Aurora has planned this secretly since the inception of the plan, and had brought in Adrian, who had also feigned being gay for years so that the two could have a sexual relationship under her parents' roof. Adrian and Aurora intended to take the money and get away, but are stopped by Veronica and Keith. Adrian is arrested with Aurora and Tanner, with Lianne facing the possibility of being cha
characters.personality_section: It is on Aurora's visit to Adrian that she goes missing. Upon Veronica's finding of Hayley's body and the realization that the two incidents must be separate, Adrian confesses that Aurora told him that she was really in town to see a guy, and that they were going to run off together and go "off the grid," which is why no one could reach her. In the end, Veronica discovers that Tanner was forced by his associate, Duane Shepard (alias Lee Jackson), to capitalize upon the disappearance of Hayley Dewalt by faking his daughter's abduction. Their plan was to create a fake ransom demand for both Hayley and Aurora's return, taking the reward money (funded through a hotline from Trish Turley's talk show) as ransom and disappearing to Bermuda. Their plan is foiled by a phone call from the real Lee Jackson, who is a woman working for the Meridian Group specializing in ransoms and kidnapping. She quickly unravels the scheme, which ended up concluding in Aurora trying to double-cross her father and his partner. Aurora had Adrian, her secret boyfriend, assault Duane in an alley near the Neptune Grand with one of her brother's maracas, stealing the ransom money from Duane and framing her father for his attack. It is revealed that Aurora has planned this secretly since the inception of the plan, and had brought in Adrian, who had also feigned being gay for years so that the two could have a sexual relationship under her parents' roof. Adrian and Aurora intended to take the money and get away

characters.name: Alonzo Lozano
characters.description: Alonzo LozanoBiographical InformationFull NameAlonzo LozanoAffiliationsOccupationCartel memberAppearancesAlonzo Lozanois a character inSeason 4ofVeronica Mars. He is a member of a mexican cartel and reports toEl Despiadado. Alonzo travels to Neptune from Mexico, with his partnerDodie Mendoza, to track down the bomber who killedGabriel, a family member of his boss, El Despiadado.

characters.name: Jenny Budosh
characters.description: Jenny BudoshBiographical InformationFull NameJenny BudoshAffiliationsOccupationHearst CollegeStudentAppearances Jenny Budoshis aHearst Collegestudent who appears inSeason Three. InPresident Evil, Jenny is first seen inProfessor Landry'scriminology class watchingVeronica Marsgive a presentation withEli "Weevil" Navarro. Weevil winks at her and she smiles in return. Jenny asks Weevil if one can ever really leave gang life behind; he tells her that even though he misses it, he's trying.

characters.name: Evelyn Bugby
characters.description: Evelyn Bugbywas a member of the alumni association who visitedNeptune Highin October 2004 to put together an alumni display for a class reunion. After annoying the journalism teacher, she assignedVeronica Marsto help Evelyn collect pictures of notable people in the class of 1979. "Why must you make the tech support people cry?" This article is astub. You can help the Veronica Mars Wiki byexpanding it.

characters.name: Heather Button
characters.description: Heather ButtonBiographical InformationFull NameHeather ButtonAffiliationsRelativesMelinda Button(sister)Dick Casablancas(ex-brother-in-law)AppearancesHeather Buttonis a character inSeason 3. She isMelinda Button's sister. Their father ran out on them.

characters.name: Bonnie Capistrano
characters.description: Bonnie CapistranoBiographical InformationFull NameBonnie CapistranoAffiliationsRelativesTed Capistrano(father)AppearancesBonnie Capistranowas a student atHearst College. She's the daughter of noted televangelistTed Capistrano, which didn't keep her from datingTim FoyleandDick Casablancasat the same time.[1] When she got pregnant, both her parents and Tim apparently took it well, but someone slippedRU-486to her, causing anabortion. When she found out it hadn't been a natural miscarriage, she hiredVeronica Marsto find the culprit.[2]

characters.name: Dick Casablancas
characters.description: Dick CasablancasBiographical InformationFull NameDick CasablancasAffiliationsRelativesRichard Casablancas(father, deceased)Betina Casablancas(mother)Kendall Casablancas(step-mother)Cassidy "Beaver" Casablancas(brother, deceased)Melinda Button(ex-wife)Heather Button (ex-sister-in-law)OccupationNeptune Highstudent,Hearst CollegefreshmanAppearancesRichard "Dick" Casablancas, Jr.isLogan Echolls's womanizing09erbest friend. He was a bully in high school and later became a frat boy atHearst College. Dick is the son of one ofNeptune'swealthiestmen. He is an Aries and his hometown is Neptune, California.[1]He is part of the in-crowd atNeptune Highand is good friends withLogan Echolls. He brags about having lots of sex, likes to surf, and bullies poorer kids, . He gave his girlfriend,Madison Sinclair, a drink laced with GHB at a party, which was then passed off to Veronica. Dick then encouraged his little brother,Cassidy "Beaver" Casablancas, to rape Veronica while she was unconscious. Dick was painfully cruel to his little brother throughout their childhood.  He  reveals that he and his father would have contests to see which one could make Cassidy cry. Dick also admits to duct-taping Cassidy's feet to the pedals of his bike, forgetting about it and a couple of hours later found him pedaling around desperately in circles. He and his father saw him as weak and bullied him mercilessly when they weren't ignoring him.

characters.name: Richard Casablancas
characters.description: Richard CasablancasBiographical InformationFull NameRichard CasablancasAffiliationsRelativesDick CasablancasCassidy CasablancasBetina Casablancas (ex-wife)Sadie Casablancas (ex-wife)Kendall Casablancas(wife)OccupationBusinessmanAppearancesH. Richard Casablancasis the father ofDickandCassidyand husband ofKendall Casablancas. Richard is the C.E.O. ofCasablancas Enterprises, apparently a real estate corporation. However, he was conning his investors for millions with his fake illustrations of real estate properties.Veronica Marsstumbles onto the truth when his son, Cassidy, asks her to investigate Richard's young, gold-digging wife,Kendall. After a meeting with theFBLA clubatNeptune High, Veronica realizes the truth and reports Richard to the S.E.C. When Cassidy tells his father about Kendall's affair withLogan Echolls, Richard panics upon finding that he had hired a private investigator, realizing that the P.I. would have uncovered his treachery. Richard orders his employees to shred all their files as the S.E.C. agents enter his building, and Richard flees to the rooftop and onto a helicopter to escape. (Cheatty Cheatty Bang Bang) Cassidy knew about his father's dirty business all along and, wanting to punish him for how he treated him, merely asked Veronica to "investigate" so that she would come forward with the information instead. (Not Pictured)

characters.name: Hamilton Cho
characters.description: Hamilton ChoBiographical InformationFull NameHamilton ChoAffiliationsRelativesJames Cho(father)OccupationNeptune HighstudentWorker atCho's PizzaAppearancesHamilton Chois a student atNeptune High. He was in the running againstSabrina Fullerfor theKane Scholarship. When Sabrina hiresVeronicato investigate who had been harassing her, they are lead to Hamilton's father,James Cho. Sabrina's mother files charges against him, but offers to let it go if Hamilton drops out of the race for the Scholarship. He does so to save his father from the charges.

characters.name: Norris Clayton
characters.description: Norris ClaytonBiographical InformationFull NameNorris ClaytonAffiliationsOccupationSherrif DeputyAppearancesNorris Claytonwas a classmate ofVeronica'satNeptune High. During middle school, he earned a reputation as a thug and a bully. He relentlessly picked onPete Kaminski, taking his lunch money every day. He does have a softer side, shown when he scared away another bully who was spitting spitballs at Veronica. After a malicious website and several bomb threats called are called in at Neptune High, an ATF agent is sent to befriend Norris on suspicion that he was running the site. However, the ATF agent,Ben, fails after getting into an argument with Norris. Ben enlists Veronica's help to find any evidence of Norris preparing to bomb the school, telling her of Norris' crush on her. Veronica visits and Norris shows her his weapon collection. While Veronica kept Norris occupied, Ben planted the bomb ingredients and weapons on Norris' trunk, revealing that Ben's plan was to frame Norris with the crime. Norris is arrested the next day but is released and the charges dropped when Veronica and the Journalism Class publish all the evidence that Ben planted false evidence and revealed that Pete Kaminski was the true handler of the malicious website in an attempt to get revenge on Norris. The exposé costsGeena Staffordher job as the Journalism teacher. ("Weapons of Class Destruction")

characters.name: Van Clemmons
characters.description:
Van ClemmonsBiographical InformationFull NameVan ClemmonsAffiliationsRelativesVincent "Butters" ClemmonsOccupationNeptune HighVice Principal, PrincipalAppearancesVan Clemmonswas the Vice Principal turned Principal ofNeptune High. During high school,Veronicaconstantly gets into trouble and as a result regularly meets with Clemmons. Occasionally, Van Clemmons asks Veronica for help, once asking her to locate the missing school mascot. Clemmons is the one who instructs Veronica to organize some old files, which led to her discovering Moorehead asTrina Echolls' father. When Moorehead is fired as principal, Veronica realizes that it was Clemmons' plan all along to become principal. When Veronica graduates, Clemmons says that he cannot decide if his life will be easier or more difficult with her gone. Clemmons reappears in "Un-American Graffiti", where he is caught on tape being shot with a paintball gun by several Neptune High students. In the 10 years that Veronica had been gone, the school was much more peaceful.
He attends the Neptune High Reunion after the abrupt end, trying to figure out who caused the mess, but quickly deduces it was Veronica when he saw her walk past him. He gives her a heartfelt look and tells her that it's been boring. "Why must you make the tech support people cry?"

characters.name: Vincent Clemmons
characters.description: Vincent ClemmonsBiographical InformationFull NameVincent ClemmonsAffiliationsRelativesVan Clemmons(father)OccupationNeptune HighstudentAppearancesVincent "Butters" Clemmonsis a student atNeptune Highand son ofVan Clemmons(Vice Principal and later Principal). When Vincent he was a freshman, was pantsed by Kelvin, a junior athlete and bully, during a pep rally. The humiliation he endured earned Vincent the nickname "Butters". Vincent vowed revenge and that following fall, the jock who had humiliated him and those who stood by and laughed at him found themselves having failed mandatory drug tests, essentially barring them from playing sports in their final year of high school. Veronicawas drawn to Butters as a suspect, mainly because her best friendWallace(who was present when Vincent was pantsed but had done nothing to save him) found himself among the athletes who failed their drug test. Wallace insisted that he was innocent, convincing Veronica to investigate Butters as the person responsible for his false positive test results.

characters.name: Stu Cobbler
characters.description: Stu CobblerBiographical InformationFull NameStu CobblerAffiliationsOccupationNeptune Highstudent (formerly)Drug dealerAppearancesStu "Cobb" Cobblerwas an unpopularNeptune Highstudent who read gun magazines during class and dealt drugs. He also had a crush onGia Goodman. Gia and her friends wanted to hit him up for drugs, but he managed to worm his way onto their party boat trip. That night,Susan Knightwas found unconscious and her breathing was starting to waver. Everyone panicked. To calm everyone down, he told them that Susan would just sleep it out and that he'd seen it a hundred times. The next morning, however, Susan was dead. Stu suggested weighing her down with an anchor and throwing her body overboard. Gia,Luke Haldeman, andCarrie Bishopdid so; Stu took a photo of them in the act and used it to them to blackmail the group for years afterward. Carrie started to feel extremely guilty, even going so far as to include themes from that night in her new (final) album,Confessional. Stu decided that it was time to shut her up and blackmailed Gia and Luke into helping him murder Carrie. Gia luresLogan Echollsto the scene, making him the primary suspect. Stu finds out thatVeronica Marshad bugged Gia's apartment and manages to use the bug to listen in on Veronica and Gia. He then murders Gia when she approaches the window. After missing Veronica by inches, he goes after her in Gia's apartment. Veronica manages to incapacitate him with herStun GunandPepper Sprayand run out of the apartment, but the exits were locked. Stu comes after her, but she manages to knock him unconscious with a golf club. He is then arrested byDan Lamb.

characters.name: Jackie Cook
characters.description: Jackie CookBiographical InformationFull NameJackie CookAffiliationsRelativesTerrence Cook(father), unnamed mother, unnamed sonOccupationNeptune Highstudent,Java the Hut waitressAppearancesJackie Cookwas a student atNeptune High. She is the daughter ofNeptune Sharksbaseball legend,Terrence Cook. She is very self-conscious of the way her classmates view her. Java the Hut waitress Prior to showing up in Neptune, Jackie had a wild past as she grew up in Brooklyn, New York that included drugs, alcohol and getting knocked up at 16 by a one night stand. Due to her life getting out of control, her mom, who was a struggling waitress, makes her a deal for her to get back on the straight and narrow and to finish high school out in California with her estranged baseball star  father, Terrance, while the mom takes care of her unnamed son.  While out in Neptune, she begins to adopt a facade of being a child of two superstar wealthy divorced parents who share custody of her and claims to have lived in multiple countries before she was 15, and also to have been spending time in the Upper West Side before coming to Neptune.

characters.name: Leo D'Amato
characters.description: Leo D'AmatoBiographical InformationFull NameLeo D'AmatoAffiliationsOccupationDeputy (formally)private security (formally) detective (Formally) FBI Agent (Currently)AppearancesLeo D'Amatowas the new Sheriff's Deputy, whoVeronica Marsbefriends. He was also responsible for releasing the Lily Kane and Aaron Echolls tapes. private security (formally) detective (Formally) FBI Agent (Currently) Without his consent, Veronica steals a recording of an anonymous tip implicatingAbel Koontzin the death ofLilly Kanefrom the evidence room. Leo is shortly suspended for the break-in, and when Veronica attempts to apologize, he is reluctant to forgive her. When Veronica admits she has fallen for him, he dismisses the claim, however they kiss during her school dance. When Veronica secretly begins to date Logan, she confesses the affair to Leo and ends the relationship. The pair manage to remain on good terms, and Leo assists Veronica in breaking-up a dognapping ring the same night she breaks up with him. To get enough money to send his little sister with Down syndrome to a private school, Leo steals and sells theAaron Echollsand Lilly Kane sex tapes to Logan. Logan promptly destroys the tapes due to the traumatic nature of them, however he inadvertently compromises the pending case against Aaron. Keith discovers Leo's participation in the theft, however, he covers for him by stating that the tapes were stolen because Leo was not at his post. Leo is promptly fired from the sheriff's department, but is able to keep the money that Logan paid him and help his sister. Leo begins working for a private security company, and finds himself working forWoody Goodman's daughter Gia. Leo contacts Keith when he is concerned that his security company's warehouse is about to be robbed. Leo loses his job for involving Keith, although Keith asks him to return as a deputy.

characters.name: Mark Dobbins
characters.description: Mark DobbinsBiographical InformationFull NameMark DobbinsAffiliationsOccupationMayor of NeptuneAppearances Mark Dobbinsis the mayor ofNeptuneinSeason 4. He puts a lot of pressure on the police chief to figure out the bombing ASAP. Due to a letter from the bomber with random requests, he has to streak naked through the town.

characters.name: Don McNotten
characters.description: Don McNottenBiographical InformationFull NameDon McNottenAffiliationsAppearancesDon is a character inSeason 4ofVeronica Mars. He is a member of the "Murderheads". He is also an accused bomber. Penn Epner kills him and tries to make it look like a suicide.

characters.name: Ms. Dunne
characters.description: Ms. DunneBiographical InformationAffiliationsAppearancesMs. Dunne is a Science Teacher atNeptune High. "Why must you make the tech support people cry?" This article is astub. You can help the Veronica Mars Wiki byexpanding it.

characters.name: Aaron Echolls
characters.description: Aaron EchollsBiographical InformationFull NameAaron EchollsStatusDeceasedAffiliationsRelativesLynn Echolls(wife)Logan Echolls(son)Trina Echolls(daughter)Charlie Stone(illegitimate son)Unamed ex-wifeOccupationMovie starAppearancesAaron Echollswas an enormously famous movie star, known primarily for his roles in action films. He was also the father ofLogan Echolls,Trina Echolls, andCharlie Stone. He is the main antagonist in the season 1 finale and a recurring antagonist in season 2. "All of a sudden everyone's running up to me, saying how they never believed I did those things..." This article contains spoilers that involve either characters or storyline.

characters.name: Logan Echolls
characters.description: Logan EchollsBiographical InformationFull NameLogan EchollsStatusDeceasedAffiliationsRelativesAaron Echolls(father, deceased)Lynn Echolls(mother, deceased)Trina Echolls(adoptive half-sister)Charlie Stone(half-brother)Veronica Mars(wife)Keith Mars(father-in-law)Lianne Mars(mother-in-law)Hunter Scott(half-brother-in-law)Aurora Scott(step-sister-in-law)Madeline Reynolds(grandmother-in-law)OccupationNeptune Highstudent (formerly)Hearst Collegestudent  (formerly)US Navy pilot lieutenant (formerly)US Military Intelligence OfficerAppearances Logan EchollswasVeronica'shusband.Duncan Kane'sbest friend, he is a snarky, witty09erwho ranges from being hostile to deeply caring. He was dating Duncan's sister and Veronica's best friend,Lilly Kane, on and off for two years until she was murdered during their sophomore year, and he later finds out that the killer was his A-list actor father,Aaron Echolls. Veronica's choices at the time leave Logan feeling betrayed and he takes to bullying her. Whenhis mothercommits suicide during his junior year, Veronica assists him in confirming her death, and they later begin dating.

Whenhis mothercommits suicide during his junior year, Veronica assists him in confirming her death, and they later begin dating.

characters.name: Lynn Echolls
characters.description: Lynn EchollsBiographical InformationFull NameLynn EchollsStatusDeceasedGenderCis- WomenAffiliationsRelativesAaron Echolls(husband)Logan Echolls(son)Trina Echolls(adopted daughter)OccupationActressAppearancesLynn Echolls (née Lester)was a famous movie star who was married toAaron Echolls, an even bigger movie star. They had one son together,Logan. To those on the outside looking in, the Echolls family had a perfect life. But in reality, Aaron was an abusive misogynist who beat Logan on a regular basis. He had affair after affair both at home and on location. Lynn tried to ignore the fact that Aaron was often taking out his temper by beating up Logan by turning to alcohol and pills. After Aaron received several threatening letters, Lynn turned toKeith Marsin an effort to discover who was behind them. It turned out to be a caterer who had seen Aaron having an affair at a party and had had her fired. At the Echolls's Christmas party, the caterer stabbed Aaron in the abdomen with an ice pick.

characters.name: Penn Epner
characters.description: Penn EpnerBiographical InformationFull NamePenn EpnerAffiliationsOccupationPizza delivery guyAppearancesPenn Epneris a character in, and true main antagonist ofSeason 4. He works as a pizza delivery guy and is a member of the "Murderheads". Penn is a bit of a "big head" personality- thinking he is smarter and savvier than others. He is also a bit of a fame whore and loves to be the center of attention. He lives to be on T.V., or interviewed, especially in regard to the bombing. Penn also gets easily butt hurt. He doesn't like it when people taunt or make fun of him, particularlyDon McNotten. He likes to be right and is upset when he is not. characters.name: Karsyn Farr
characters.description: Karsyn FarrBiographical InformationFull NameKarsyn FarrAffiliationsAppearancesKarsyn Farris a character inSeason 4. She is a wealthy client ofVeronica.

characters.name: Shae Fennel
characters.description: Shae FennelBiographical InformationFull NameShae FennelAffiliationsRelativesWallace Fennel(husband)Noah Fennel(son)OccupationAttorneyAppearancesShae Fennelis the wife ofWallace Fennel. They have a son named Noah.

characters.name: Alicia Fennel
characters.description: Alicia FennelBiographical InformationFull NameAlicia FennelAffiliationsRelativesNathan Woods(ex-husband)Hank Fennel(husband, deceased)Wallace Fennel(son)Darrell Fennel(son)OccupationKane SoftwareemployeeAppearancesAlicia FennelwasWallace's mother who datedKeith Mars. Alicia moved to Neptune with her two boys Wallace andDarrellafter the death of her husbandHank Fennel. She started datingKeith Marsmidway through Season One after he got rid of a boarder that was abusing her kindness. They broke up afterNathan Woodscame back into her life claiming that Wallace Fennel was actually his son. As a result, Keith  snooped into Alicia's house trying to find evidence to whether what Nathan was saying was true or not. They are later reunited. "Why must you make the tech support people cry?"
